code:
import io
import string

fn abs_int(_ n: Int) -> Int
  if n < 0
    -n
  else
    n
  end
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  mut token = ""
  mut has_best = false
  mut best_val = 0
  mut best_abs = 0
  while i <= n
    mut is_sep = true
    if i < n
      let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(x)
        x
      when None
        32
      end
      if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
        is_sep = true
      else
        is_sep = false
      end
    end
    if is_sep
      if string.len(token) > 0
        match string.parse_int(token)
        when Some(v)
          let a = abs_int(v)
          if not has_best
            has_best = true
            best_val = v
            best_abs = a
          else if a < best_abs
            best_val = v
            best_abs = a
          end
        when None
          ()
        end
        token = ""
      end
    else
      let b2 = match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(x)
        x
      when None
        0
      end
      token = "#{token}#{string.from_byte(b2)}"
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  println("min_abs=#{best_val}")
end
